# ravetools

The goal of `ravetools` is to provide memory-efficient signal & image
processing toolbox for `intracranial Electroencephalography`.
Highlighted features include:

- [`Notch filter`](#) (remove electrical line frequencies)
- [`Welch Periodogram`](#) (averaged power over frequencies)
- [`Wavelet`](#) (frequency-time decomposition)
- 2D, 3D image convolution via `FFT`
- `CT/MRI` to `MRI` image alignment

## Installation

The package is available on `CRAN`. To install the compiled version,
simply run:

``` r
install.packages("ravetools")
```

Installing the package from source requires installation of proper
compilers and some `C` libraries; see [this
document](https://github.com/dipterix/ravetools/blob/master/installation.md)
for details.

## `iEEG` preprocess pipeline

This is a basic example which shows you how to preprocess an `iEEG`
signal. The goal here is to:

- Plot diagnostic graphs to inspect channels
- Apply Notch filters to remove electrical line noise
- Frequency-time decomposition and show the power densities

\* Channel referencing is not included

### 1. Generate toy examples:

``` r
library(ravetools)

# Generate 20 second data at 2000 Hz
time <- seq(0, 20, by = 1 / 2000)
signal <- sin( 120 * pi * time) + 
  sin(time * 20*pi) + 
  exp(-time^2) * 
  cos(time * 10*pi) +
  rnorm(length(time))

diagnose_channel(signal, srate = 2000)
```

![](https://github.com/dipterix/ravetools/blob/master/adhoc/README-figures/toy-data-1.png?raw=true)

### 2. Apply `Notch` filters and inspect `Periodograms`

``` r
## ------- Notch filter --------
signal2 <- notch_filter(signal, sample_rate = 2000)

diagnose_channel(signal, signal2, srate = 2000,
                 name = c("Raw", "Filtered"))
```

![](https://github.com/dipterix/ravetools/blob/master/adhoc/README-figures/notch-filter-1.png?raw=true)

### 3. Frequency-time decomposition

Current version of `ravetools` provides two approaches: `Wavelet` and
`Multi-taper`. `Wavelet` uses the
[`Morlet wavelet`](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Morlet_wavelet) and
obtains both amplitude and phase data, while `Multi-taper` does not
generate phase data. However, the amplitude obtained from `Multi-taper`
is smoother than `Wavelet`.

#### Using `Wavelet`:

``` r
## ---------- Wavelet -----------
coef <- morlet_wavelet(
  signal2, freqs = seq(1, 100, by = 1), 
  srate = 2000, wave_num = c(2, 15))
amplitude <- 20 * log10(Mod(coef[]))

# For each frequency, decimate to 100 Hz
downsample_amp <- apply(amplitude, 2, decimate, q = 20)
downsample_time <- decimate(time, q = 20)

par(mfrow = c(1,1))
image(
  z = downsample_amp,
  x = downsample_time,
  y = seq(1, 100, by = 1),
  xlab = "Time (s)",
  ylab = "Frequency (Hz)",
  main = "Amplitude (dB)",
  sub = "Wavelet at 2000 Hz, then down-sampled to 100 Hz", 
  col = matlab_palette()
)
```

![](https://github.com/dipterix/ravetools/blob/master/adhoc/README-figures/wavelet-1.png?raw=true)

#### `Multi-taper`

Alternatively you can use `Multi-tapers` to obtain amplitude data. The
algorithm is modified from source code
[here](https://github.com/preraulab/multitaper_toolbox). Please credit
them as well if you adopt this approach.

``` r
## ---------- Multitaper -----------
res <- multitaper(
  data = signal2,
  fs = 2000,
  frequency_range = c(1, 100),
  time_bandwidth = 1.5,
  window_params = c(2, 0.01),
  nfft = 100
)

par(mfrow = c(1,1))
image(
  x = res$time,
  y = res$frequency,
  z = 10 * log10(res$spec),
  xlab = "Time (s)",
  ylab = 'Frequency (Hz)',
  col = matlab_palette(),
  main = "Amplitude (dB)"
)
```

![](https://github.com/dipterix/ravetools/blob/master/adhoc/README-figures/multitaper-1.png?raw=true)

#### Image alignment

`ravetools` provides imaging co-registration via `NiftyReg`
(`doi.org/10.1117/1.JMI.1.2.024003`). You can align `CT` to `MRI`, or
`MRI` (T2) to `MRI` (T1). The method can be body `rigid`, `affine`, or
`non-linear`.

``` r
source <- system.file("extdata", "epi_t2.nii.gz", package="RNiftyReg")
target <- system.file("extdata", "flash_t1.nii.gz", package="RNiftyReg")
aligned <- register_volume(source, target, verbose = FALSE)

source_img <- aligned$source[[1]]
target_img <- aligned$target
aligned_img <- aligned$image

par(mfrow = c(2, 2), mar = c(0.1, 0.1, 3.1, 0.1))

pal <- grDevices::grey.colors(256, alpha = 1)
image(source_img[,,30], asp = 1, axes = FALSE,
      col = pal, main = "Source image")
image(target_img[,,64], asp = 1, axes = FALSE,
      col = pal, main = "Target image")
image(aligned_img[,,64], asp = 1, axes = FALSE,
      col = pal, main = "Aligned image")

# bucket fill and calculate differences
aligned_img[is.nan(aligned_img) | aligned_img <= 1] <- 1
target_img[is.nan(target_img) | aligned_img <= 1] <- 1
diff <- abs(aligned_img / target_img - 1)
image(diff[,,64], asp = 1, axes = FALSE,
      col = pal, main = "Percentage Difference")
```

![](https://github.com/dipterix/ravetools/blob/master/adhoc/README-figures/coregistration-1.png?raw=true)

## References

#### To cite ravetools in publications use, please cite the `RAVE` paper from `Beauchamp's lab`

``` R
Magnotti, JF, and Wang, Z, and Beauchamp, MS. RAVE: comprehensive
  open-source software for reproducible analysis and visualization of
  intracranial EEG data. NeuroImage, 223, p.117341.
```

The `multitaper` function (MIT License) uses the script derived from
`Prerau's lab`. The `TinyParallel` script is derived from `RcppParallel`
package (GPL License) with `TBB` features removed (only use
`tinythreads`). The `register_volume` function uses `NiftyReg` (BSD
License) developed by `CMIC` at University College London, UK (its R
implementation is released under GPL license).

``` R
[1] Magnotti, JF, and Wang, Z, and Beauchamp, MS. RAVE: comprehensive
    open-source software for reproducible analysis and visualization of
    intracranial EEG data. NeuroImage, 223, p.117341.
[2] Prerau, Michael J, and Brown, Ritchie E, and Bianchi, Matt T, and
    Ellenbogen, Jeffrey M, and Purdon, Patrick L. Sleep Neurophysiological
    Dynamics Through the Lens of Multitaper Spectral Analysis. Physiology,
    December 7, 2016, 60-92.
[3] Modat, M., Cash, D.M., Daga, P., Winston, G.P., Duncan, J.S. and 
    Ourselin, S., 2014. Global image registration using a symmetric 
    block-matching approach. Journal of medical imaging, 1(2), pp.024003-024003.
[4] JJ Allaire, Romain Francois, Kevin Ushey, Gregory Vandenbrouck, Marcus
    Geelnard and Intel (2022). RcppParallel: Parallel Programming Tools for
    'Rcpp'. R package version 5.1.5.
    https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=RcppParallel
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`band_pass1()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/band_pass.md)
  [`band_pass2()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/band_pass.md)
  : Band-pass signals

- [`baseline_array()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/baseline_array.md)
  : Calculate Contrasts of Arrays in Different Methods

- [`butter_max_order()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/butter_max_order.md)
  : 'Butterworth' filter with maximum order

- [`check_filter()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/check_filter.md)
  : Check 'Arma' filter

- [`collapse()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/collapse.md) :
  Collapse array

- [`convolve_signal()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/convolve.md)
  [`convolve_image()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/convolve.md)
  [`convolve_volume()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/convolve.md)
  :

  Convolution of `1D`, `2D`, `3D` data via `FFT`

- [`decimate()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/decimate.md) :
  Decimate with 'FIR' or 'IIR' filter

- [`design_filter()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/design_filter.md)
  : Design a digital filter

- [`design_filter_fir()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/design_filter_fir.md)
  :

  Design `'FIR'` filter using `firls`

- [`design_filter_iir()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/design_filter_iir.md)
  : Design an 'IIR' filter

- [`detrend()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/detrend.md) :
  Remove the trend for one or more signals

- [`diagnose_channel()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/diagnose_channel.md)
  : Show channel signals with diagnostic plots

- [`diagnose_filter()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/diagnose_filter.md)
  : Diagnose digital filter

- [`dijkstras_surface_distance()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/dijkstras-path.md)
  [`surface_path()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/dijkstras-path.md)
  : Calculate distances along a surface

- [`fast_cov()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/fast_cov.md) :
  Calculate massive covariance matrix in parallel

- [`fast_quantile()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/fast_quantile.md)
  [`fast_median()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/fast_quantile.md)
  [`fast_mvquantile()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/fast_quantile.md)
  [`fast_mvmedian()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/fast_quantile.md)
  : Compute quantiles

- [`fill_surface()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/fill_surface.md)
  : Fill a volume cube based on water-tight surface

- [`hanning()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/filter-window.md)
  [`hamming()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/filter-window.md)
  [`blackman()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/filter-window.md)
  [`blackmannuttall()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/filter-window.md)
  [`blackmanharris()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/filter-window.md)
  [`flattopwin()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/filter-window.md)
  [`bohmanwin()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/filter-window.md)
  : Filter window functions

- [`filter_signal()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/filter_signal.md)
  : Filter one-dimensional signal

- [`filtfilt()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/filtfilt.md) :
  Forward and reverse filter a one-dimensional signal

- [`find_peaks()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/find_peaks.md)
  : Find peaks of a signal

- [`fir1()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/fir1.md) :

  Window-based `FIR` filter design

- [`firls()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/firls.md) :

  Least-squares linear-phase `FIR` filter design

- [`freqz2()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/freqz2.md) :
  Frequency response of digital filter

- [`gammatone_fast()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/gammatone_fast.md)
  : Apply gamma-tone filters to obtain auditory envelopes

- [`grow_volume()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/grow_volume.md)
  : Grow volume mask

- [`internal_rave_function()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/internal_rave_function.md)
  : Get external function from 'RAVE'

- [`left_hippocampus_mask`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/left_hippocampus_mask.md)
  : Left 'Hippocampus' of 'N27-Collin' brain

- [`matlab_palette()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/matlab_palette.md)
  : 'Matlab' heat-map plot palette

- [`mesh_from_volume()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/mesh_from_volume.md)
  : Generate 3D mesh surface from volume data

- [`multitaper_config()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/multitaper.md)
  [`multitaper()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/multitaper.md)
  : Compute 'multitaper' spectral densities of time-series data

- [`naive_nmf()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/naive_nmf.md)
  : A naive implementation of non-negative matrix factorization

- [`new_matrix4()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/new_matrix4.md)
  [`as_matrix4()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/new_matrix4.md)
  :

  Create a `Matrix4` instance for `'Affine'` transform

- [`new_quaternion()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/new_quaternion.md)
  [`as_quaternion()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/new_quaternion.md)
  :

  Create a `Quaternion` instance to store '3D' rotation

- [`new_vector3()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/new_vector3.md)
  [`as_vector3()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/new_vector3.md)
  :

  Create a `Vector3` instance to store '3D' points

- [`notch_filter()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/notch_filter.md)
  : Apply 'Notch' filter

- [`detect_threads()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/parallel-options.md)
  [`ravetools_threads()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/parallel-options.md)
  : Set or get thread options

- [`plane_geometry()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/plane_geometry.md)
  : Create a two-dimensional plane in three dimensional space

- [`plot_signals()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/plot_signals.md)
  : Plot one or more signal traces in the same figure

- [`project_plane()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/project_plane.md)
  : Project plane to a surface

- [`pwelch()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/pwelch.md)
  [`print(`*`<ravetools-pwelch>`*`)`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/pwelch.md)
  [`plot(`*`<ravetools-pwelch>`*`)`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/pwelch.md)
  [`mv_pwelch()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/pwelch.md) :
  Calculate 'Welch Periodogram'

- [`raw_to_uint8()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/raw-to-sexp.md)
  [`raw_to_uint16()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/raw-to-sexp.md)
  [`raw_to_uint32()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/raw-to-sexp.md)
  [`raw_to_int8()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/raw-to-sexp.md)
  [`raw_to_int16()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/raw-to-sexp.md)
  [`raw_to_int32()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/raw-to-sexp.md)
  [`raw_to_int64()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/raw-to-sexp.md)
  [`raw_to_float()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/raw-to-sexp.md)
  [`raw_to_string()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/raw-to-sexp.md)
  : Convert raw vectors to R vectors

- [`rcond_filter_ar()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/rcond_filter_ar.md)
  : Computer reciprocal condition number of an 'Arma' filter

- [`register_volume()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/register_volume.md)
  :

  Imaging registration using `'NiftyReg'`

- [`resample_3d_volume()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/resample_3d_volume.md)
  :

  Sample '3D' volume in the world (anatomical `'RAS'`) space

- [`rgl_call()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/rgl-call.md)
  [`rgl_view()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/rgl-call.md)
  [`rgl_plot_normals()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/rgl-call.md)
  :

  Safe ways to call package `'rgl'` without requiring `'x11'`

- [`shift_array()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/shift_array.md)
  : Shift array by index

- [`stimpulse_find()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/stimpulse_interpolate.md)
  [`stimpulse_extract()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/stimpulse_interpolate.md)
  [`stimpulse_align()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/stimpulse_interpolate.md)
  [`stimpulse_interpolate()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/stimpulse_interpolate.md)
  : Find and interpolate stimulation pulses

- [`stimulation_signal`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/stimulation_signal.md)
  : Sample stimulation recording

- [`vcg_isosurface()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/vcg_isosurface.md)
  : Create surface mesh from 3D-array

- [`vcg_kdtree_nearest()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/vcg_kdtree_nearest.md)
  :

  Find nearest `k` points

- [`vcg_mesh_volume()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/vcg_mesh_volume.md)
  : Compute volume for manifold meshes

- [`vcg_raycaster()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/vcg_raycaster.md)
  : Cast rays to intersect with mesh

- [`vcg_smooth_implicit()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/vcg_smooth.md)
  [`vcg_smooth_explicit()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/vcg_smooth.md)
  : Implicitly smooth a triangular mesh

- [`vcg_sphere()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/vcg_sphere.md)
  : Simple 3-dimensional sphere mesh

- [`vcg_subdivision()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/vcg_subdivision.md)
  : Sub-divide (up-sample) a triangular mesh

- [`vcg_subset_vertex()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/vcg_subset_vertex.md)
  : Subset mesh by vertex

- [`vcg_uniform_remesh()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/vcg_uniform_remesh.md)
  : Sample a surface mesh uniformly

- [`vcg_update_normals()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/vcg_update_normals.md)
  : Update vertex normal

- [`wavelet_kernels()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/wavelet.md)
  [`morlet_wavelet()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/wavelet.md)
  [`wavelet_cycles_suggest()`](https://dipterix.org/ravetools/reference/wavelet.md)
  : 'Morlet' wavelet transform (Discrete)
